final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing 3x3 character expression grid for 赵灵儿 from 仙剑奇侠传.

Style/medium: 3D animation, Pixar-style character design, expressive cartoon rendering with soft subsurface scattering
Subject: young woman with voluminous dark wavy hair and round wire-rimmed glasses as base character, 赵灵儿-inspired features including traditional Chinese aesthetic elements, 9 distinct expression panels
Composition: 3x3 grid layout with equal square panels, each panel showing character peeking through a torn hole in white paper, consistent framing across all 9 cells, head-and-shoulders crop
Scene/backdrop: plain white paper background with torn circular holes, each panel isolated with clean white border separation, minimal environmental distraction
Lighting/mood: soft diffused studio lighting from upper left, warm and friendly atmosphere, gentle shadows inside paper holes
Color palette: varied outfit colors per panel (green, red, yellow, black/white, orange, blue, purple, pink, teal) against neutral white paper base
Materials/textures: matte paper texture with torn fibrous edges, smooth skin with subtle specular highlights, fabric textures for different outfits
Constraints: must maintain character likeness consistency across all 9 panels; each panel must show the torn paper hole framing device; expressions must be clearly readable at thumbnail size
Avoid: photorealistic skin pores; anime cel-shading; inconsistent character proportions between panels; cluttered backgrounds; watermark text
